name: GravRoll by Müsslin
author: Müsslin (audiomyweb)
description: Creative MIDI generation toolkit for Ableton Live 12 combining style generation, chord/pad, arp pulse, and bass anchor engines with variation, humanize, and scale-correct functions. Aimed at fast electronic music sketching; released at v4.2.0.
notes: The author marks this as a development/experimental build.
